content: PyO3 latest 0.29.0 (2026-06-11), prior 0.28.3 (2026-04). MSRV Rust 1.83. 0.28 added abi3 subclassing of native types (needs Python 3.12+). Supports CPython 3.7-3.14 + PyPy 3.9-3.11. Free-threaded (3.13t/3.14t) since 0.23. abi3 gives single wheel across Python versions. Windows wheels fully supported.
